description: Risk tier approval and execution guard policies for platform lanes.

low.label: Low Risk
low.description: Read-only or fully reversible actions with no external posting.

medium.label: Medium Risk
medium.description: Write operations with clear rollback and limited blast radius.

high.label: High Risk
high.description: External posting, visible changes, or customer messaging.

critical.label: Critical Risk
critical.description: High blast radius or difficult rollback operations.

d1_ceo.note: CEO can self-approve high risk actions. Critical still requires explicit confirmation.

shared_exec_orchestrator.note: Exec orchestrator can approve medium and forward high to Telegram.

global_circuit_breaker.description: If more than 3 high or critical actions are rejected in 60 minutes, pause all high and critical operations.

human_override_switch.description: Operator can disable autonomous execution across all lanes.
